_comment: Unit definitions for Shattered Dominion asset generation pipeline.

style_global.art_style: stylized 2D fantasy game asset, clean and readable, semi-stylized illustration, designed for in-game use
style_global.not_style: NOT photorealistic, NOT oil painting, NOT cinematic portrait, NOT concept-art poster, NOT hyper-detailed face rendering, NOT chibi, NOT goofy, NOT watercolor, NOT flat vector, NOT anime
style_global.quality: clean linework, readable silhouette, consistent game-ready style, professional 2D game art
style_global.lighting: clear flat-to-soft directional lighting, readable contrast, no dramatic cinematic shadow
style_global.background: transparent background, isolated subject only, no floor, no ground shadow, no environment, no backdrop
style_global.format: single PNG sprite, full body visible, no cropping of limbs, centered composition

pose_styles.idle: relaxed combat-ready standing pose, weight balanced, weapon held loosely at side or low guard, facing slightly right
pose_styles.walk_left: mid-stride walking pose moving left, left foot forward, arms in natural walking swing, body slightly leaned forward
pose_styles.walk_right: mid-stride walking pose moving right, right foot forward, arms in natural walking swing, body slightly leaned forward
pose_styles.attack_melee: mid-swing melee attack, weapon raised or swinging toward the right, body twisted with attack momentum, aggressive pose
pose_styles.attack_ranged: ranged attack pose, bow drawn or projectile thrown toward the right, weight on back foot, arm extended
pose_styles.cast: spellcasting pose, one or both hands raised with glowing magical energy, staff lifted or hands open with arcane light
pose_styles.hurt: recoiling from a hit, staggering backward to the left, one arm raised defensively, visibly pained
pose_styles.death: falling or collapsed on the ground, weapon dropped, eyes closed, final defeated pose
pose_styles.portrait: simple waist-up portrait, facing slightly left, weapon visible at side, clean and readable, stylized game UI card art

framing.battle_unit: full body visible from top of head to feet, character fills 75-85 percent of frame height, centered horizontally, transparent background
framing.portrait: waist-up, head and torso centered, fills 85 percent of frame, transparent background

human.anatomy: average human proportions, sturdy and athletic, broad shoulders, square jaw, serious expression
human.skin_tone_range: fair to tan European fantasy complexion
human.distinguishing: no fantastical features, wholly human appearance, capable and battle-hardened look

elf.anatomy: slender but wiry, slightly taller than human, graceful limbs, sharply pointed ears, angular refined facial features, high cheekbones
elf.skin_tone_range: pale ivory to light olive, flawless skin
elf.distinguishing: long pointed ears clearly visible, elegant bone structure, luminous slightly-large eyes, ageless face

dragonkin.anatomy: powerful broad-shouldered humanoid, shorter neck, heavy musculature, pronounced brow ridges, slightly forward-leaning stance
dragonkin.skin_tone_range: dark charcoal grey to burnt umber, leathery scaled skin
dragonkin.distinguishing: curved swept-back bone horns, distinct reptilian snout with flared nostrils, slit-pupil eyes glowing amber-orange, visible neck and forearm scales, non-prehensile tail

warrior.armor_description: full plate armor, pauldrons, gorget, gauntlets, greaves, battered and scarred from battle, functional medieval fantasy style
warrior.weapon: one-handed broadsword and kite shield or two-handed greatsword
warrior.silhouette_notes: broad and imposing, heavy armor mass, low center of gravity, shield prominent on off-arm

samurai.armor_description: lamellar-style fantastic armor with overlapping lacquered plates, kabuto-inspired helmet with faceplate, tassets over hakama-style lower body, elegant but functional
samurai.weapon: single curved katana-style blade, long grip, slight curve
samurai.silhouette_notes: compact and precise, sharp angular silhouette, disciplined posture, no wasted movement

ninja.armor_description: dark layered cloth armor, tight-fitting, minimal plating on forearms and shins, face wrapped leaving only eyes visible, utility pouches on belt
ninja.weapon: pair of short-bladed daggers or a wakizashi
ninja.silhouette_notes: lean and low-profile, weight on front foot, poised to strike, shadow-operative body language

archer.armor_description: medium leather armor, reinforced chest piece, bracers, light pauldron on bow arm, practical ranger gear, hood or padded coif
archer.weapon: longbow held at side or raised, quiver on back with visible arrows
archer.silhouette_notes: lean athletic build, side-on stance shows archer profile, quiver on back is visible

mage.armor_description: layered arcane robes with rigid pauldrons or vambraces, arcane runes embossed on fabric, tall peaked hat or close hood, leather belt with pouches, not a costume — functional war-mage gear
mage.weapon: tall gnarled wood staff with glowing arcane crystal set in iron mount at top
mage.silhouette_notes: tall vertical silhouette from staff, robes have weight and fabric complexity, no cartoonish oversized hat

tank.armor_description: heaviest full-plate armor available, reinforced everywhere, tower shield, great helm with visor, layered pauldrons, thick greaves, looks impenetrable
tank.weapon: tower shield as primary defense, short mace or war hammer in weapon hand
tank.silhouette_notes: widest and heaviest silhouette of all classes, shield creates a wall of metal, low planted stance

tiers.basic: standard issue gear, well-maintained but plain, no ornament
tiers.veteran: battle-worn gear with repairs, minor distinctions like a colored plume or engraved emblem, clearly experienced
tiers.elite: masterwork equipment, ornate engravings, high-quality materials, commanding presence, clearly elite status

biomes.forest: armor and gear tinted with forest greens and dark browns, moss or leaf motifs pressed into metal, earthy worn appearance
biomes.desert: sun-bleached patina on armor, sand-worn edges, warm ochre and rust color tones, cloth wrappings over metal to prevent sun heat
biomes.volcanic: armor scorched with heat marks, dark iron with orange glowing cracks at joints, obsidian accents, ember-toned color palette

batch_presets._comment: Core idle sprites — all race/class combos (main starting batch)
Core action frames — all race/class combos
Ranged and cast frames for relevant classes
Simple stylized portraits for game UI cards
Full set of poses for one character (test batch)
Quick single idle test — one character, one pose
